content.description: The AI Generator lets you create Peakboard projects via prompting.
Multiple controls can be combined into a single reusable component.
The new Calendar Control allows you to display a calendar directly inside your project.

list_items: Added Reload button when a package was changed externally.
Added function to generate Peakboard XML from Peakboard JSON.
The loading indicator has been improved and the loading window no longer opens multiple times.
Improved menu expander to make it easier to reach with the cursor.
Big dialogs (template editor, script editor) now open on the screen the Peakboard Designer is currently on.
Sub-dialogs of the same size as their master dialog now open with a horizontal offset.
Spacing lines now ignore clicks.
Fixed UI bug during minimize.
Fixed warning messages appearing behind the splash screen when opening a pbmx file.
Fixed error when renaming a control from lower to upper case letters.
Reworked the Setup.
Added branch information to the Setup with option to update from the corresponding branch or return to master.
Added health check at the end of the Setup with automatic backup on failure.
Added silent update parameter for designer.exe.
Fixed Peakboard BYOD uninstallation to remove all components and binaries.
Fixed duplicate Peakboard.ExtensionKit.Process64.exe in Peakboard BYOD installation.
Fixed uninstallation to correctly report failure and detect running instances.
Fixed silent uninstall to remove uninstall.exe.
Added validation warning if a dataflow or output step is based on an unloaded data source.
Added support for Peakboard Extensions in Hub flows.
Changed default for steps in Hub flow projects from 'on data change' to 'always'.
Hub flow projects now check the Peakboard Hub license on each upload instead of only at Peakboard Designer start.
Fixed flow sorting to update alphabetically immediately after creating or renaming a flow.
Fixed function execute trigger to properly await the source function.
Fixed unexpected exception when tagging a flow in a data project.
Fixed OPC UA support with the reload step in flows when the 'variables' configuration is used.
Added ability to create Peakboard Hub Lists from the Peakboard Designer based on a variable list, data source or dataflow, and to convert variable lists into Peakboard Hub Lists.
Fixed Peakboard Hub dialog bug to show the project hub when the user hub is empty and use 'Connect' instead of 'Ok' on enter.
Fixed missing error message when saving a screenshot to the Peakboard Hub file manager fails.
Fixed base-64 error when adding a box to the Peakboard Hub for access rights.
Fixed addtohublist Lua command to log an error when the update fails.
Filters are now preserved when switching Peakboard Hub Lists if the new list contains the same columns.
Fixed Replace Peakboard Hub List function to work when the ID column is included.
Fixed unexpected error when selecting a list for the first time on a new Peakboard Hub List data source.
Preview data of cascaded dataflows now reloads automatically when a table structure changes.
Referenced dataflows now update the controls automatically when preview data of a data source changes.
Separated settings from the data and steps section in dataflows.
Fixed missing column display in dataflows with a join step after adding a new column to the base data source.
Fixed preview data not updating when adding a sort step to a dataflow based on a variable list.
Fixed dataflows in flows getting stuck when executed before all necessary data is loaded.
Improved performance when opening the data source dialog.
Fixed scroll wheel inside the Lists selection of the Peakboard Hub List data source.
Fixed scrollbar in the Time data source's add time table by repositioning the info box.
Added support for compressed URL resources and data sources.
Resources now allow changing files without reauthentication.
Fixed images from Sharepoint and OneDrive with multiple dots in the filename.
Fixed resources being placed at incorrect locations when using drag and drop.
Fixed 'Navigate-to-source' button when the source is not visible on the current screen.
Fixed Office 365 resources losing their authentication when opened.
Reworked Google Drive and Google Spreadsheets with a new resource, file picker and data source.
MicrosoftGraphConnection and GoogleDriveConnection now allow navigating to the resource instead of just the list element.
Improved validation when adding a variable.
Added 'allow empty value' checkbox for variable, variable list and function constraints.
Fixed tagging and description for variable lists and screens.
Replaced the value constraint table with the tag pattern for single variables and global function parameters.
Fixed parameter constraint errors when saving a global function.
Fixed problem when renaming of data sources, dataflows, variable lists and variables to different text casing.
Added 'create [variable]' option to the Loop Building Block context menu.
Building Blocks now retain the selected column when changing the list, if a column with the same name exists.
Fixed multiline strings starting with '[' generating incorrect delimiters.
Fixes have been made to the 'Set Value' building block so that columns are no longer swapped.
Fixed boolean handling in Item Building Blocks for dataflows based on a variable list.
Fixed bug in JSON array parsing in Building Blocks.
Improved the pre-selection of the top-level building block in a variable's updated script so that the selected variable is used.
Fixed NullReferenceException after closing the Box dialog.
Added ability to open multiple scripts in tabs.
Fixed Script Tester error for HTTP requests.
Removed unwanted whitespace in multi-line blocks inside loops.
Issue with script suggestions following the switch from Building Blocks to Script has been resolved.
Fixed exception when opening the script editor from the menu bar.
Added 'Use row index' checkbox for data bindings in Conditional Formatting within styled lists and styled tile collections.
Added ability to duplicate a statement in Conditional Formatting.
Removed Balloon and Cloud Control from the Template Editor.
Fixed row number in databinding being lost when clicking 'OK' without first closing the popup.
Fixed issue in databinding and 'This styled list' Building Blocks for listviews with parameters.
Added horizontal alignment for button text.
Replaced the Button progress bar with a centered animated icon.
Image control now supports Base64-encoded images.
Image control now updates the 'File name' property of all bound controls when the image in a cloud or Peakboard Hub resource changes.
Fixed issue in Textbox padding property.
Fixed scripting access for Textboxes with input type set to Numeric.
Fixed Dropdown selection with transparent background.
Added dropdown to select the streaming resolution for the Video control.
Camera screenshots are now saved as JPG instead of PNG.
Video control now creates the local cache folder if it does not exist.
Fixed camera image upload to the Peakboard Hub.
Fixed webcam upload to Sharepoint.
Fixed entering a fixed value in the Default camera index.
Fixed memory leak in the PDF control.
Fixed NullReferenceException in the PDF control.
Fixed PDFs not loading in the Web control.
The configuration dialogue for the Webpage Control now opens when you double-click.
Added Calendar Control.
Added components that connect Controls.
Added button in the property grid to jump directly to the bound data source for all data bindings.
Fixed 'c' within text in date format being shown as the calendar week number.
Improved performance when selecting a box if the connected Peakboard Hub is unreachable.
Fixed cloud connection when the 'prefer hostname' property is active.
Fixed error message when adding an unreachable Peakboard Box.
Fixed error after closing the box management dialog.
Fixed critical issue when reading screenshots due to a closed stream.
Fixed IP display when the hostname is long.
Fixed memory leak in the Log and Debug Panel.
Fixed screenshots from Peakboard Boxes ignoring DPI / Windows zoom.
Fixed WebServer to restart after exiting because of a missing certificate.
Increased default column width in Debug Panel tables.
Fixed the delete button in Extensions being cut off.
Fixed Callback Port changes in BACnet not being saved.
Oracle client updated to work for all databases.
Fixed Power BI refresh token expiration.
Added support for sending E-Mail attachments based on a Base64 string.
